# K-JEOPARDY (Enhanced AI Generator Version)

This game has been updated with a "Topic-Based" AI Generator. Each time you play, you can generate a completely unique board.

## How to Play (Direct Execution)
1. Unzip the folder.
2. Find the file: **`PLAY_K_JEOPARDY.html`**
3. **Double-click it.** It will open in your web browser instantly.

## New Features
*   **Topic Input**: Type a subject (e.g., "Workplace", "K-Drama", "Slang") in the lobby before clicking GENERATE GAME.
*   **Dynamic Final Jeopardy**: The Final Jeopardy question is now also generated by AI to match your topic!
*   **No Python Needed**: This version is a single-file application. No terminal commands required.

## Troubleshooting (AI Features)
If the "Generate Game" button doesn't work:
1. **Check Internet**: You must be online for the AI to work.
2. **API Key**: If the bundled key expires, you can get a free one at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey.
3. **Wait**: AI generation takes 10-15 seconds.

## Built by Sunny Shin
